overview.title: Billing
overview.description: Your plan, subscription status, and account balance.

noSubscription.title: No active subscription
noSubscription.description: This workspace is not subscribed to a plan. Choose a plan to start sending.

pending.title: Subscription pending
pending.description: The first payment for this subscription is being processed. This page will reflect the result once the charge resolves.

pastDue.title: Payment failed — action needed
pastDue.description: A payment for this subscription was declined and is being retried automatically. Settle the outstanding balance below to avoid the account being suspended.

suspended.title: Account suspended for non-payment
suspended.description: Sending is disabled because the outstanding balance was not settled. Settle it below to reinstate the account and re-enable sending.

currentPlan.title: Current plan
currentPlan.overageDescriptionBlocked: Sends over the allowance are blocked.
currentPlan.overageDescriptionBilled: Sends over the allowance are billed as overage.
currentPlan.renewalCancels: Cancels at the end of the current period

settle.title: Outstanding balance
settle.description: Settle the unpaid invoice to bring the account back to good standing.
settle.success: Payment received — your account has been reinstated.
settle.declined: The payment was declined again. The account remains suspended — please try once more or use a different payment method.
settle.alreadySettled: That invoice has already been settled.

plans.title: Plans
plans.description: Choose a plan to subscribe this workspace.

alreadySubscribed.title: This workspace already has a subscription
alreadySubscribed.descriptionPrefix: A workspace may hold only one subscription at a time. Manage the current subscription from the

declined.title: Payment declined
declined.description: The first charge for that plan was declined, so the subscription was not activated. You can try subscribing again.

empty.title: No plans available
empty.description: There are no plans to subscribe to right now. Please check back later.

card.overageBlocked: Sends over the allowance are blocked

dialog.title: Subscribe to {{plan}}
dialog.description: You will be charged {{price}} now for the first {{period}} period. The subscription becomes active once the charge succeeds.

toast.subscribed: Subscription active — your plan is now in effect.
toast.subscriptionExists: This workspace already has a subscription.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Billing history and payment attempts for this workspace.

empty.title: No invoices yet
empty.description: Invoices appear here once a billing period has been charged.

detail.title: Invoice
detail.description: Line items and payment attempts for this invoice.
detail.notFound: This invoice could not be found.
detail.noAttempts: No payment attempts have been made yet.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Metered sends consumed in the current billing period.

noSubscription.title: No active subscription
noSubscription.description: Subscribe to a plan to start metering usage.

blocked.title: Allowance reached
blocked.description: This plan blocks sends beyond the included allowance. Further campaign starts and transactional sends will be rejected until the next billing period begins.

overage.title: Overage billing
overage.description_one: Sends beyond the allowance are billed as overage. {{formattedCount}} overage send recorded so far this period.
overage.description_few: Sends beyond the allowance are billed as overage. {{formattedCount}} overage sends recorded so far this period.
overage.description_many: Sends beyond the allowance are billed as overage. {{formattedCount}} overage sends recorded so far this period.
overage.description_other: Sends beyond the allowance are billed as overage. {{formattedCount}} overage sends recorded so far this period.

refreshNote.title: Figures update periodically
refreshNote.description: Usage is rolled up by a background process, so sends from the last few minutes may not yet be reflected here.

usage.closedPeriodsPrefix: Usage for closed periods is reflected in each period’s
